channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cardinals' Erick Fedde understands Marmol's decision to pull him with a no-hitter possible
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erick Fedde did not give up any hits on Wednesday, but his walks prevented him from throwing a no-hitter. The St. Louis Cardinals right-hander pitched six innings on Wednesday against the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: JOHN PERROTTO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Joey Bart singles in 13th to give Pirates 2-1 win over Cardinals despite 6 hitless from Fedde
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Joey Bart singled in the winning run with the bases loaded in the 13th inning to give the Pittsburgh Pirates a 2-1 win over the St. Louis Cardinals on Wednesday, despite six hitless innings from Erick Fedde.
item.dc:creator: JOHN PERROTTO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pedro Martinez says he has family members unaccounted for in Dominican nightclub roof collapse
item.description: Dominican-born Hall of Fame pitcher Pedro Martinez said Wednesday he has family members unaccounted for who were inside the Santo Domingo nightclub when its roof collapsed. The 53-year-old Martinez was born in Manoguayabo, about 10 miles west of the Dominican Republic's capital city.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James becomes first professional male athlete to have likeness depicted in a Ken doll
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Basketball great LeBron James has become the first professional male athlete to have his likeness depicted in a Ken doll. Mattel Inc. unveiled the LeBron Ken doll on Wednesday to kick off the toy manufacturer's “Kenbassador” series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Luka Doncic expects a lot of emotions for him and Mavs fans in his return to Dallas with Lakers
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic knows there will be a lot of emotions when he steps on the court in Dallas for the first time wearing his No. 77 jersey for the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Grizzlies' Ja Morant debuts grenade toss celebration after he was fined for gun gesture celebration
item.description: The Memphis Grizzlies' Ja Morant debuted a new grenade toss celebration after he was fined $75,000 by the NBA for celebrations with gun gestures.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Female athletes to be in the majority at 2028 Los Angeles Olympics after big win for women's soccer
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Female athletes will be in the majority at an Olympics for the first time at the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games thanks to a big win for women’s soccer.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Min Woo Lee hits the Masters after his first PGA Tour win. Jason Day thinks he can be world No. 1
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Min Woo Lee broke into the top 25 in the world following his victory a couple weeks ago at the Houston Open, the long-awaited first on the PGA Tour for the big-hitting Australian who had won just about everywhere else around the world.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Double vision: Denmark's Nicolai and Rasmus Hojgaard set to become first twins to play the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Rasmus Hojgaard and his identical twin brother Nicolai grew up playing golf in Denmark, occasionally pretending they were on the other side of the world at Augusta National.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prep roundup: Benicia opens league play with key baseball win over Acalanes
item.description: Serra wins tight game against St. Ignatius. College Park staves off Campolindo. Castro Valley softball routes James Logan.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Lakers' Luka Doncic left stunned after getting ejected over interaction with fan
item.description: Luka Doncic was ejected in a tight game on Wednesday after he picked up a second technical foul for trash talking a fan sitting courtside against the Oklahoma City Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Timberwolves watch their playoff position tumble after blowing huge lead in 4th quarter
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Regular-season defeats don’t get much more brutal than the one the Minnesota Timberwolves suffered Tuesday. The wide-open nature of the Western Conference playoff race doesn’t give them much time to stew over what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Olivia Miles is transferring from Notre Dame to TCU to finish her college career
item.description: Olivia Miles is transferring from Notre Dame to finish her college career at TCU. Miles announced her decision on “NBA on TNT” on Tuesday night and was talking to Candace Parker when she received a box from Shaquille O’Neal with a TCU jersey in it.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Bears' Jaquan Brisker feels 'best I ever felt,' is eager to test Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Jaquan Brisker is recovering from a concussion and is eager to face Ben Johnson's offense as the Bears begin their offseason workouts, with a focus on exercise and cognitive performance.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: LA Dodgers visit White House to celebrate World Series win
item.description: Team president Stan Kasten said all the players wanted to attend, according to the Los Angeles Times.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Kings score three times in third period to beat Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's playoff chances are growing slimmer with each loss, and it looks like it's going to take a miraculous turn of events to get in now.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks advance to NCAA regional finals
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah gymnastics team is moving on to the NCAA regional finals after scoring a 197.625 on the first night of competition, tying with Denver University. Both the Utes and the Pioneers advance to Saturday's regional finals along with UCLA and Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cubs home opener: Some things to know for fans heading to Wrigley Field on Friday
item.description: CHICAGO — For fans attending Wrigley Field for the Cubs homer opener Friday afternoon, there are some numbers to keep in mind. The Wrigley Field fan text messaging service is available in the ballpark to report issues in the park without leaving your seat at the game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees OF Brett Gardner's son died of carbon monoxide poisoning, had 'layer' on organs, officials say
item.description: Carbon monoxide poisoning was the cause of death of the teenage son of former New York Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner, authorities in Costa Rica confirmed Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: ESPN commentator weighs in on NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: Athletes from four collegiate teams are calling Tampa home for the next few days as the NCAA's Women’s Final Four returns.
item.dc:creator: Nyesha Harper, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
